description: Stage global data into shared memory before computing in CUDA/GPU kernels to cut repeated global loads when global-bandwidth bound. 分阶段把 global 数据搬到 shared memory 再计算，减少重复 global load。
body: 分阶段把 global 数据搬到 shared memory 再计算，减少重复 global load（受 global 带宽限制时）。适用于 GEMM、卷积等有数据复用的 kernel。. Use when GPU kernel correctness and profiling work touches kernel launch parameters, memory-access shape, correctness harnesses, occupancy evidence, and profiler counters. Do not use this guidance to override a more specific pack, user instruction, or repository contract. Actions: choose the smallest direction that preserves the domain contract; inspect the current files first, keep the change scoped to the owning boundary, and record what evidence changed the decision. Validation signals include golden-output comparisons, deterministic benchmark runs, sanitizer output, Nsight or rocprof evidence, and CPU/GPU tolerance checks. Risk boundary: escalate or stop when the task involves benchmark-only changes, silent numerical drift, undefined synchronization, bank conflicts, and hardware-specific regressions, missing owner evidence, or live external state.
